events.title: Shambala at Dragon Tea Temple with Aleceo
events.description: A biweekly Saturday gathering in Dragon Tea Temple's candlelit garden — DJ Aleceo (Cafe De Anatolia / Kosa / Pipe & Pochet circuit) weaves world and ethnic electronic music through a ceremonial arc. Doors at 5:30pm, free-flow tea ceremony begins at 6pm, the set builds into a bonfire jam from 9:30pm. Alcohol-free, barefoot, collective. Aleceo is one of Ubud's most trusted conscious-electronic selectors.
events.short_description: Biweekly Saturday ritual gathering at Dragon Tea Temple — tea ceremony, DJ Aleceo, bonfire into the night.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No.8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 200,000 early bird / IDR 250,000 presale / IDR 300,000 door
